title: coussapoa orthoneura
intro: Coussapoa orthoneura is a type of plant species belonging to the family Urticaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Coussapoa orthoneura include its potential to treat conditions such as hypertension, fever, and skin irritations, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and infections. Coussapoa orthoneura is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves in hot water to release its medicinal compounds.
